title: Self-Hosted Agent Skills Directory — Curated Source Seed
scope_note: This is a curated source map, not a claim that every listed skill is safe, effective, licensed for redistribution, or expert-authored. The ecosystem changes too quickly for a static exhaustive list. The intended design is continuous ingestion, canonicalization, evaluation, and signed publication. One upstream reference implementation entry is omitted from this published copy under the project's public identity policy. Extended 2026-07-17 with tree-verified sources from the agent-skills atlas research pass.

trust_tiers.A1: Verified first-party, government, standards, or canonical ecosystem source. Still requires per-version license and security review.
trust_tiers.A2: Recognized expert, academic, or specialist-maintained source with strong signal and explicit methodology.
trust_tiers.B: Useful maintained community source or aggregator. Import only after canonical-source, provenance, license, and evaluation checks.
trust_tiers.C: Experimental, niche, derived, or immature source. Index for research; manual promotion only.
trust_tiers.Q: Quarantine/discovery-only. Never auto-install, execute, or mirror.

required_skill_schema.requirements: Canonical publisher, repository, skill path, version/tag, commit SHA, content hash, immutable artifact URI
Original author, contributors, upstream sources, derivative/fork relations, evidence links
Capability tree, domain, task verbs, inputs, outputs, jurisdiction, regulatory scope
Supported harnesses/models, required tools, MCP servers, packages, environment variables, OS/runtime
Filesystem, shell, network, browser, secrets, payments, identity, calendar/email, PII, PHI, privileged tools
Threat model, scanner results, prompt-injection review, sandbox profile, approval checkpoints, rollback plan
Task suite, no-skill baseline, pass-rate delta, output-quality score, token/cost delta, regression history
Last upstream update, dependency and regulation versions, stale-after date, revalidation triggers
Owner, review state, trust tier, signed publication, deprecation/revocation status, incident history

ingestion_pipeline.action: Pull skills.sh curated/official metadata, allowlisted repositories, official MCP registry, and approved community feeds.
Resolve forks and copies to the original repository and exact skill path; record upstream attribution.
Fetch immutable commit/tag, compute SHA-256 for every file, and retain a content-addressed manifest.
Parse repository and file-level licenses. Index-only when redistribution or modification is unclear.
Parse SKILL.md, scripts, dependencies, URLs, install hooks, environment variables, and suspicious instructions.
Analyze natural-language instructions together with code/resources; run multiple scanners and repository-context checks.
Run without secrets, with deny-by-default network/filesystem/tool access; capture behavior and side effects.
Run realistic tasks with and without the skill; score correctness, quality, safety, token cost, and failure modes.
Require domain experts for legal, healthcare, HIPAA, finance, housing, government, compliance, and high-impact actions.
Publish immutable metadata and approved files; expose only least-privilege permissions and narrow triggers.
Retrieve through a capability tree and compose workflows as DAGs; do not load the whole catalog into context.
Re-run on upstream changes, model/tool changes, scanner updates, regulation changes, or reported incidents.

high_risk_policies.policy: Information/research/coaching only by default; jurisdiction and effective-date fields required; mandatory source verification and human legal review before reliance.
No PHI leaves approved boundaries; de-identification tests; BAA/vendor controls where applicable; clinical decision support requires qualified human oversight.
No autonomous trades, transfers, wallets, filings, or investor communications; transaction simulation and explicit approval gates.
Fair-housing and anti-discrimination checks; local licensing/law scope; no steering or protected-class inference; financial assumptions must be sourced.
Geometry/unit/constraint validation; simulation before fabrication; approval before exporting machine-ready or construction-ready files.
Consent, platform terms, anti-spam, privacy, truthful claims, and brand-review gates.
No diagnosis or crisis counseling; make limitations explicit; escalate medical/mental-health or safety issues to qualified support.
